name: Baked Pumpkin
recipeIngredient: Cinnamon sugar (or just Cinnamon) for topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450°F.
2. Melt the butter in a dish or pan measuring 8x8, 9x9, or 7x11 inches.
3. Combine the remaining ingredients in a blender and mix until smooth.
4. Pour the mixture into the melted butter.
5. Sprinkle cinnamon (or cinnamon-sugar) on top.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes.
7. Serve as a side dish.
